# MYT — Stand-Alone Apartment Management

> MYT is a free mobile app for self-managed residential apartment communities in India (3-300 flats), built by a stand-alone apartment resident. It handles maintenance collection, communications, requests, and finances without needing an external management company.

## Who it's for

- Self-managed residential apartments / Apartment Owners Associations (AOAs) in India
- Apartment sizes 3 to 300 flats
- Communities that don't have or don't want a professional facility-management company
- Owners, tenants, admins, watchmen — each with role-appropriate access

## Key features

- Maintenance fee collection and apartment-wide ledger
- Operating account and corpus fund tracking
- Announcements, notices, and reminders to all residents
- Resident-raised requests (electrical, plumbing, etc.) with status tracking
- Visitor management
- Polls, meetings, in-app chat
- Excel-based bulk import for instant onboarding
- Resident directory with owner/tenant distinction

## Status

- Live on Google Play (com.themyt.app) since April 2026
- Live on Apple App Store since May 2026
- DPIIT-recognised startup (DIPP256256)
- Free to use
